_notes: Per-rack pallet counts, bay counts, and level counts come from data/rack-drawings/*.pdf
(verified May 6, total 3203 matches the U.pdf grand-total stamp).
Rearranged May 6 from user's hand-drawn top-down sketch:
- Vertical racks left-to-right: J, H, I, G, F, E, D, C, B, A
- U is a single horizontal rack at the north end (y=37)
- J is a polyline bracket on the far west (bottom arm + vertical + top arm)
- J's bottom arm meets G at a CLOSED junction (no traffic)
- J's top arm meets U at a CLOSED junction (no traffic)
Coordinates are approximate until May 20 site measurement; topology is committed.
kit_corridor_side / rt_aisle_side preserved from the previously confirmed B-G
alternation; J and H's adjacent corridor types are TBD until measurement.
May 6 (later correction from user feedback on 3D render):
- H, I raised so south ends are above J's bottom arm (y=10) — they live INSIDE
J's bracket but do not pass through the bottom arm. Bay widths shrunk from
2.70 to 2.31 to fit between J's arms (PDF didn't stamp H/I bay widths).
- G is the only rack that overlaps J's bottom arm (its body passes through y=10
and meets J at the closed junction). G + F-B north ends shortened to y=36.35
so they don't intersect U's horizontal at y=37; bay widths 2.70→2.61.
- U east end pulled back from x=58.6 to x=45.0 so U doesn't extend past A.
14 bays at ~1.73 m each (PDF didn't stamp U bay width either).

racks._geometry: bracket on the far west: bottom arm + vertical + top arm; 18 bays J1-J18 split 4+10+4. Bottom arm meets G at CLOSED junction (~20.8, 10). Top arm meets U at CLOSED junction (~20.8, 37).

racks._orientation: vertical, 2nd from west; lives INSIDE J's bracket — south end y=11 stays north of J's bottom arm (y=10), north end y=36.35 stays south of U (y=37). J↔H and H↔I corridor types TBD until May 20.
vertical, 3rd from west; INSIDE J's bracket like H — south above J bottom arm, north below U. I↔G is the kit corridor (matches G's kit_west).
vertical, 4th from west; the ONLY rack whose body overlaps J's bottom arm — passes through y=10 and meets J at CLOSED junction near (20.9, 10). North end y=36.35 stays south of U.
vertical, 5th from west; north end y=36.35 stays south of U
vertical, 6th from west; north end y=36.35 stays south of U
vertical, 7th from west; north end y=36.35 stays south of U
vertical, 8th from west; north end y=36.35 stays south of U
vertical, 9th from west; north end y=36.35 stays south of U
vertical, rightmost (east); 11 bays A2-A12 per A.pdf

horizontal (E-W) at north end y=37, single segment 14 bays U1-U14; west end meets J's top arm at CLOSED junction (~20.8, 37). East end x=45 stays just past A (x=43.7) — no further. Bay width ~1.73m (PDF didn't stamp; shrunk from assumed 2.70 to fit user's drawn topology).
